Two Markets. One Standard.

Where We
Do Our Best Work.

Concert & Live Event Production

From intimate venue shows to large-scale outdoor concerts, we manage every layer of the production — audio, video, lighting, staging, rigging, backline, and crew. You focus on the artist and the audience. We handle everything else.

Hawaii's live music scene is growing. We're built for it.

  • Concert & festival productions island-wide
  • Full vendor sourcing & coordination
  • Stage management & show-day execution
  • Audio engineering & AV technical direction
  • Load-in through strike — fully managed
Resort & Corporate Events

Hawaii's resort corridor — Wailea, Kaanapali, Waikiki — runs on flawless execution. Incentive groups, executive galas, corporate conferences, and multi-day productions where every detail is visible and every failure is felt.

We bring the technical depth and operational discipline that high-end properties demand.

  • Grand Wailea, Four Seasons, Andaz & beyond
  • Incentive groups & executive galas
  • Corporate conferences & hybrid events
  • Multi-vendor coordination under one PM
  • Seamless client communication throughout
10+
Years in live audio, AV production, and technical project management
$250K+
In AV inventory managed and maintained for convention-scale productions
4
Islands covered — Oahu, Maui, Kauai, and the Big Island
Full Scope. No Gaps.

Everything the
Production Needs.

We're not just AV. We're not just logistics. We're the single point of contact that owns the entire production — so your team never has to manage vendors, chase confirmations, or wonder what's happening on show day.

01
Production Management
End-to-end ownership from the first brief through final strike. Budget, schedule, vendors, and stakeholders — all managed under one roof.
02
AV & Technical Direction
Networked audio, video projection, LED, signal flow, and hybrid streaming — designed, deployed, and personally verified.
03
Vendor Coordination
We source, contract, and manage every vendor — audio, staging, lighting, rigging, backline, décor, and trucking — so you don't have to.
04
Live Sound & Audio Engineering
Technical audio management for concerts and events — from system design and speaker placement to front-of-house support on show day.
05
Show Day Execution
Calm, focused leadership on show day. Real-time problem solving so clients never feel the turbulence — only the result.
06
Hybrid & Livestream Events
Real experience built during COVID — helped launch online worship experiences for 10 churches during the pandemic — built from scratch. Broadcast-quality audio and video for in-room and remote audiences, seamlessly integrated.
On the Job

From the Booth.

The Person Behind It

Built on
Real Experience.

Founder & Lead PM
Jeremy L.
Motley
Event Production & AV Project Manager · Hawaii

Acoustic Aura started at the board — mixing consoles, signal flow, live sound for churches and venues. Founder Jeremy L. Motley trained at FIRST Institute in Recording Arts and Show Production, graduating valedictorian in 2019, and went straight into live production work in Orlando and Savannah.

A US Army veteran, Jeremy brings military discipline to every production — the same calm, methodical execution whether the room holds fifty people or five thousand. When COVID hit, that discipline meant helping launch online worship experiences for 10 churches, building deep hybrid and livestream production experience in the process.

Acoustic Aura is where it all comes together. Audio at the core. Production end to end. Hawaii is home.
